query:
INSERT INTO quests (questType, title, description, targetValue, rewardCoins, rewardExp, icon, isDaily) VALUES
('steps', 'Morning Walk', 'Take 5,000 steps today', 5000, 50, 100, '🚶', 1),
('workout', 'Strength Training', 'Complete a 30-minute workout', 30, 100, 200, '💪', 1),
('nutrition', 'Protein Power', 'Consume 100g of protein', 100, 75, 150, '🥩', 1),
('hydration', 'Stay Hydrated', 'Drink 8 glasses of water', 8, 25, 50, '💧', 1),
('calories', 'Calorie Balance', 'Stay within your calorie goal', 1800, 100, 200, '🔥', 1),
('battle', 'Arena Champion', 'Win 1 battle today', 1, 150, 300, '⚔️', 1);
